Our Attorneys

At Batey Brophy & O’Dea, we limit our caseload so we can give every client the attention they deserve. When you work with us, you work directly with an experienced attorney who knows your case and cares about your outcome.

Nolia Batey O'Dea

Partner

Nolia focuses on personal injury and family law. She holds an LL.M. in animal law from Lewis & Clark Law School and chairs the Jefferson County Citizen Foster Care Review Board. She became a lawyer because she cares about people who are going through the worst day of their life.

Read Full Bio

Katie Brophy

Partner

Katie focuses on family law -- divorce, custody, property division, and the difficult transitions that families go through. She carries one of the largest caseloads in the firm and works closely with our team to make sure every client gets the attention they deserve.

Read Full Bio

Tim O'Dea

Partner

Tim handles Social Security disability, probate, and uncontested divorce matters for the firm. He brings practical, straightforward guidance to every client he works with.

Read Full Bio
